visual_description: In a modern office with glass partitions and hanging pendant lights, a group of people in business attire stand facing a wall-mounted screen. A man in a blue shirt walks quickly past the foreground, his back turned, while a woman in a white shirt stands near a desk with a stack of papers, looking toward the screen.
